heading: State and local income tax refunds
label: 6050E State and local income tax refunds
notes: Amendments1986—Subsec. (b). , in amending subsec. (b) generally, substituted “information is required” for “information is furnished” in heading and, in text, substituted references to persons required to make a return for former references to persons making a return and references to persons whose name is required to be set forth for former references to persons whose name is set forth.Pub. L. 99–5141984—Subsec. (b). inserted provision that no statement is required under this subsection with respect to any individual if it is determined (in the manner provided by regulations) that such individual did not claim itemized deductions under chapter 1 for the taxable year giving rise to the refund, credit, or offset.Pub. L. 98–369

children.heading: Requirement of reporting
children.label: a Requirement of reporting
children.text: Every person who, with respect to any individual, during any calendar year makes payments of refunds of State or local income taxes (or allows credits or offsets with respect to such taxes) aggregating $10 or more shall make a return according to forms or regulations prescribed by the Secretary setting forth the aggregate amount of such payments, credits, or offsets, and the name and address of the individual with respect to whom such payment, credit, or offset was made.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is required
children.label: b Statements to be furnished to individuals with respect to whom information is required

children.text: the name of the State or political subdivision thereof, and
the information required to be shown on the return with respect to refunds, credits, and offsets to the individual.

children.heading: Person defined
children.label: c Person defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “person” means the officer or employee having control of the payment of the refunds (or the allowance of the credits or offsets) or the person appropriately designated for purposes of this section.
